top_signals.title: ECB Says Consumers’ Short-Term Price Expectations Fall Sharply
top_signals.summary: Inflation expectations among euro-area consumers for the next year fell significantly in May, even before a deal was reached to end the hostilities in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bank of England launches policy statement and draft rules on regulating systemic stablecoins
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England has today published its policy statement and draft Code of Practice (rules) for systemic stablecoin issuers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Apple posts worst day in over a year after MacBook and iPad price hikes
top_signals.summary: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump-Backed Golf Resort Advances as Vietnam Seizes Farmland
top_signals.summary: Dozens of police moved into the site of northern Vietnam’s $1.5 billion Trump-branded golf resort project shortly after 7 a.m. on Friday, as the first few plots of farmers’ land were officially seized by the state.

top_signals.title: Exclusive | Relative Newcomer Banner Capital Lands Backing From GCM Grosvenor - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Exclusive | Relative Newcomer Banner Capital Lands Backing From GCM Grosvenor  WSJ
